mapper.sql: a.album_id, a.group_id, a.user_id, a.name, a.description, a.type, COALESCE(a.cover_image_path, ( SELECT i.image_path FROM album_photo ap_cover INNER JOIN diary_image i ON i.image_id = ap_cover.image_id INNER JOIN diary d_cover ON d_cover.diary_id = i.diary_id AND d_cover.user_id = a.user_id WHERE ap_cover.album_id = a.album_id ORDER BY ap_cover.sort ASC, i.image_id ASC LIMIT 1 )) AS cover_image_path, a.sort, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album_photo ap_count INNER JOIN diary_image i_count ON i_count.image_id = ap_count.image_id INNER JOIN diary d_count ON d_count.diary_id = i_count.diary_id AND d_count.user_id = a.user_id WHERE ap_count.album_id = a.album_id) AS photo_count, a.created_at, a.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM album_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = 'AI' AND name = 'AI 整理' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO album_group (user_id, name, type, sort) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{sort})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM album_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND type = 'CUSTOM'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM album_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO album (group_id, user_id, name, description, type, cover_image_path, sort) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{type}, #{coverImagePath}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE album SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, cover_image_path = #{coverImagePath} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND album_id = #{albumId} AND type IN ('AI', 'CUSTOM')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM album WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND album_id = #{albumId} AND type IN ('AI', 'CUSTOM')
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM album a WHERE a.group_id IN
#{groupId}
ORDER BY a.sort ASC, a.album_id ASC

SELECT
FROM album a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.type = 'AI' ORDER BY a.updated_at DESC, a.album_id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO album_photo (album_id, image_id, sort) VALUES
(#{albumId}, #{imageId}, #{index})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM album_photo WHERE album_id = #{albumId} AND image_id = #{imageId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.image_id, i.diary_id, d.user_id, i.image_path, i.sort, d.title AS diary_title, d.date AS diary_date, d.mood_key, CASE WHEN fp.image_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS favorite, d.created_at FROM album_photo ap INNER JOIN album a ON a.album_id = ap.album_id INNER JOIN diary_image i ON i.image_id = ap.image_id INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = i.diary_id LEFT JOIN favorite_photo fp ON fp.image_id = i.image_id AND fp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.album_id = #{albumId} AND d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ap.sort ASC, ap.image_id ASC

SELECT i.image_id, i.diary_id, d.user_id, i.image_path, i.sort, d.title AS diary_title, d.date AS diary_date, d.mood_key, CASE WHEN fp.image_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS favorite, d.created_at FROM album_photo ap INNER JOIN album a ON a.album_id = ap.album_id INNER JOIN diary_image i ON i.image_id = ap.image_id INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = i.diary_id LEFT JOIN favorite_photo fp ON fp.image_id = i.image_id AND fp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.album_id = #{albumId} AND d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ap.sort ASC, ap.image_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album_photo ap INNER JOIN album a ON a.album_id = ap.album_id INNER JOIN diary_image i ON i.image_id = ap.image_id INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = i.diary_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.album_id = #{albumId} AND d.user_id = #{userId}
